scripts.dev:logs: cd infra && docker compose logs -f api web
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:shared
scripts.build:shared: cd packages/shared && npx tsc --outDir dist --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --declaration --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck
scripts.build:docker: cd infra && docker compose build api web
scripts.db:push: cd infra && docker compose exec api npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss
scripts.db:seed: cd infra && docker compose exec api npx tsx prisma/seed.ts
